issue_title: Not Challenged to Accept Terms of Service or Privacy Policy on Registration
issue_body_preview:
<!--
IF YOU DON'T FILL OUT THE FOLLOWING INFORMATION YOUR ISSUE MIGHT BE CLOSED WITHOUT INVESTIGATING
-->
### Bug Report or Feature Request (mark with an `x`)
```
- [X] bug report -> please search issues before submitting
- [ ] feature request
```

### OS and Version?
Mac Sierra 10.12.6
test_description_zh: 在注册页面中，验证当配置了服务条款（Terms of Service）和隐私政策（Privacy Policy）时，用户在注册流程中是否会被要求勾选同意这些条款
expected_result_zh: 注册表单中应显示服务条款和隐私政策的复选框，用户必须勾选同意后才能完成注册，未勾选时注册按钮应处于禁用状态或提交时显示验证错误
